summaries.title: Week 16: spark-cli Progress
summaries.summary: This week focused on spark-cli. Completed 3 issues including: Support Github Issue creation by title and a folder of documents; Make flush-dns support Windows and add test cases; Task: Install frontend skills system-wide and update docs.
summaries.summaryZh: 本周专注于 spark-cli。完成了 3 个 issues，包括：Support Github Issue creation by title and a folder of documents；Make flush-dns support Windows and add test cases；Task: Install frontend skills system-wide and update docs。

strengths.zh: 专注于功能开发并交付价值
strengths.en: Strong focus on feature development and delivering value

strengths.zh: 积极识别并解决问题
strengths.en: Proactive in identifying and resolving issues

strengths.zh: 高产出，持续交付
strengths.en: High productivity with consistent delivery

improvements.zh: 为 issues 添加更详细的描述以便更好地跟踪
improvements.en: Add more detailed descriptions to issues for better tracking

improvements.zh: 将大型任务拆分为更小、可交付的单元
improvements.en: Consider breaking large tasks into smaller, deliverable chunks

strengths.zh: 有条不紊的问题解决方法
strengths.en: Methodical approach to problem-solving

strengths.zh: 全周保持持续的工作节奏
strengths.en: Consistent work rhythm throughout the week

strengths.zh: 能够在多个项目之间灵活切换
strengths.en: Ability to context-switch between multiple projects

weaknesses.zh: 有时过于关注实现而忽略规划
weaknesses.en: Sometimes focus on implementation over planning

weaknesses.zh: 可能需要更多的前期设计文档
weaknesses.en: May benefit from more upfront design documentation

suggestions.zh: 在开始复杂任务前花 10-15 分钟进行规划
suggestions.en: Spend 10-15 minutes planning before starting complex tasks

suggestions.zh: 定期反思已完成的工作以识别模式
suggestions.en: Regular reflection on completed work to identify patterns
Consider keeping a brief daily log of decisions made

summaries.title: Week 15: spark-cli Progress
summaries.summary: This week focused on spark-cli. Completed 12 issues including: 更新文档 features 和 spec 目录; Docs Task: 更新文档内容和分析报告; Add spark docs sub-command: init & site and more.
summaries.summaryZh: 本周专注于 spark-cli。完成了 12 个 issues，包括：更新文档 features 和 spec 目录；Docs Task: 更新文档内容和分析报告；Add spark docs sub-command: init & site 等。

summaries.title: Week 14: spark-cli Progress
summaries.summary: This week focused on spark-cli. Completed 6 issues including: 整合 GitHub Task Workflow 和 spark-task-init 到 spark-skills 仓库; 修复 spark task create 命令的 bug; 扩展 spark task 命令：init, create, delete, impl 子命令 and more.
summaries.summaryZh: 本周专注于 spark-cli。完成了 6 个 issues，包括：整合 GitHub Task Workflow 和 spark-task-init 到 spark-skills 仓库；修复 spark task create 命令的 bug；扩展 spark task 命令：init, create, delete, impl 子命令 等。
